name: project-seoul
description: Project Seoul - the voice-first, visual, programmable personal browser: native source, canonical protocol, and design labs.

scripts.test: npm run test:protocol && npm run test:canvas
scripts.check: npm run check:scripts && npm run check:json && npm run check:manifest && npm run check:boundary && npm run check:neutrality && npm run check:native-arch && npm run check:product-arch && npm run check:canvas-webui && npm run check:syntax && npm run check:protocol
scripts.check:scripts: for f in $(git ls-files '*.sh'); do bash -n "$f" || exit 1; done && echo 'bash -n: OK'
scripts.check:json: node -e "for (const f of ['native/chromium.lock.json','native/patches/manifest.json','package.json']) { JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8')); console.log('json OK:', f); }"
scripts.test:canvas: cd apps/canvas-prototype && npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && cd ../.. && npm run build:canvas && node --test apps/canvas-prototype/tests/generalization.test.mjs apps/canvas-prototype/tests/patch-engine.test.mjs apps/canvas-prototype/tests/render.smoke.mjs
